title: LearningAdaptationEpisode
description: A single episode record for the Learning & Adaptation Layer's ChromaDB ReplayBuffer. Encodes a state-action-reward-next_state tuple from one BDI planning cycle. Decision 2 resolved: Option A — goal-priority adaptation (BrainEnv Box action space). Neuroanatomical analogue: hippocampal episodic memory replay driving basal ganglia dopamine-modulated policy update.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this episode was recorded.

episode_boundary.description: What constitutes one episode. 'bdi_cycle' = one BDI planning cycle (goal commit → COMPLETED/FAILED). Decision 2 Option A.

observation.description: Observation vector at the start of this episode.

success_rate.description: Rolling success rate over the observation window.

escalation_rate.description: Fraction of recent episodes that triggered escalation.

task_type_onehot.description: One-hot encoding of the goal class / task type. Length K = number of goal classes.

channel_success_rate.description: Per-channel success rates [http, a2a, file, render, control-signal].

action.description: Action taken by the RL policy — signed goal-priority-weight deltas per goal class.

goal_priority_deltas.description: Signed delta applied to ExecutiveGoal.priority_weight per goal class. Clipped to [-0.2, +0.2]. Length K matches task_type_onehot. Decision 2 Option A.

reward.description: Scalar reward for this episode. Derived from MotorFeedback.reward_signal.value. Positive = better than expected; negative = worse.

next_observation.description: Observation vector at the start of the next episode (s').

done.description: True if this episode ended the current training run (e.g. max_steps reached).

task_type.description: Goal class / task type label. Used as ChromaDB metadata for per-class habit detection.

priority.description: Sampling priority = |reward|. Higher priority → more likely to be sampled in replay. Used for rolling eviction (lowest priority evicted first).

goal_id.description: Optional. ExecutiveGoal.id this episode corresponds to.

session_id.description: Optional. Session scope for batch grouping.
